must_detect.matched_text:
Trivera Finserve Limited — Data Export Approval & DPA Schedule (India DPDPA / PIT Code)
Scope: Processing of client onboarding records (KYC contact, masked PAN), trade confirmations, and employee login logs; Aadhaar and full PAN not stored; child data (under 18) not onboarded.
Legal basis: consent for marketing; legitimate uses for compliance and contracts; no reliance on implied consent for sensitive identifiers.
Minimisation: forms labeled “Aadhaar / PAN / GSTIN (optional)” are either disabled for retail clients or captured as redacted tokens (e.g., PAN hash), not in raw form.
Retention: onboarding files 5 years; access logs 18 months; marketing preferences until withdrawal; auto-deletion schedules tested and not paused.
Insider controls: processors receive no unpublished price-sensitive information; this memo refers only to publicly announced Q4 results and generic workflow steps.
Negative assurance: no leak, breach, or sharing of UPSI is occurring or proposed; domestic exchange listing rules are observed under the company’s Insider Trading Code.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
